rows.title: Basque Country's AVPD Marks Tenth Anniversary of RGPD with Ten Strategic Milestones in Euskadi
rows.summary: AVPD published a 10-year RGPD retrospective tied to 10 strategic milestones for the Basque Country. Authority states: bridge between EU law and Basque territory; reinforced explicit/informed/unambiguous consent standard; operationalised access/rectification/portability/erasure rights; processed 200+ rights-protection cases in 2025.
